questions.q: What's the most critical element of a Day 1 onboarding experience?
options: Clear communication of role expectations, tools access, and team introductions

questions.q: A new hire feels lost after their first week. Most likely cause?
options: No structured onboarding plan or buddy was assigned
They should have figured it out

questions.q: What's the ideal duration for a structured onboarding program?
options: Until the employee asks to stop
Welcome email, document submission, tools setup, and team intro

questions.q: How do you measure onboarding effectiveness?
options: By how happy the new hire seems
Time-to-productivity, 90-day retention rate, and manager feedback
By the number of documents signed
